tiles.title: Total Messages (14 days)
tiles.description: Total bot messages in the last 14 days

tiles.title: Total Events (14 days)
tiles.description: Total events including bot messages and topics

tiles.title: Message Distribution by Agent
tiles.description: Distribution of messages across agent instances

tiles.title: User Retention Distribution
tiles.description: User retention patterns by activity level

tiles.title: Peak Usage Hours (UTC)
tiles.description: Message distribution by hour of day

queries.text:
customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where name == "BotMessageSend"
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| summarize TotalMessages = count()
| project TotalMessages

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| where isnotempty(user_Id)
| summarize UniqueUsers = dcount(user_Id)
| project UniqueUsers

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| summarize TotalEvents = count()
| project TotalEvents

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| where isnotempty(cloud_RoleInstance)
| summarize ActiveAgents = dcount(cloud_RoleInstance)
| project ActiveAgents

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where name == "BotMessageSend"
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| summarize MessageCount = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| where isnotempty(user_Id)
| summarize UniqueUsers = dcount(user_Id) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where name == "BotMessageSend"
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| where isnotempty(cloud_RoleInstance)
| summarize MessageCount = count(), UniqueUsers = dcount(user_Id) by cloud_RoleInstance
| project AgentName = cloud_RoleInstance, MessageCount, UniqueUsers
| order by MessageCount desc

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| where isnotempty(user_Id)
| summarize DaysActive = dcount(bin(timestamp, 1d)), TotalInteractions = count() by user_Id
| extend UserType = case(
    DaysActive == 1, "New User",
    DaysActive <= 3, "Occasional User",
    DaysActive <= 10, "Regular User",
    "Frequent User"
)
| summarize UserCount = count() by UserType
| order by UserCount desc

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| summarize
    TotalEvents = count(),
    BotMessages = countif(name == "BotMessageSend"),
    TopicStarts = countif(name == "TopicStart"),
    TopicEnds = countif(name == "TopicEnd"),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(user_Id)
    by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| project Date = timestamp, UniqueUsers, BotMessages, TopicStarts, TopicEnds, TotalEvents
| order by Date desc

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where name == "BotMessageSend"
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| extend HourOfDay = hourofday(timestamp)
| summarize MessageCount = count(), UniqueUsers = dcount(user_Id) by HourOfDay
| order by HourOfDay asc
